name: Starzen Company Limited
summary: Starzen Company Limited engages in the processing and sale of meat and meat products, food stuffs, etc. in Japan. The company offers ham, sausage, bacon, roast beef, roast pork, and hamburgers, as well as poultry, offal, and by-products, as well as livestock products. It sells its products to supermarkets, meat specialty stores, department stores, restaurants, fast food chains, convenience stores, co-operatives, food processing manufacturers, meat wholesale traders, and others. The company exports its products to the United States, Hong Kong, Singapore, Macau, Thailand, Taiwan, Canada, the European Union, Switzerland, Liechtenstein, Norway, Vietnam, Myanmar, the Philippines, and Mexico. Starzen Company Limited was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
